hero.headline: Relax, Restore, Rejuvenate
hero.subheading: Let the spa come to you
hero.description: Spa level massage therapy in your home, at your convenience.

about.bio: Trillium is a massage therapist with 10 years of experience. Working in the LA Metro Area, Trillium found success in specializing in In-Home mobile massage therapy, working solo and through platforms like Soothe and Zeel since 2016.
about.focus: Combining relaxation and pain relief techniques, Trillium provides you with effective massage therapy from the comfort of your own home.
about.stats: With more than 3,000 in-home massage therapy sessions, Trillium has maintained a
about.statsClose: , reflecting the quality and care he puts into his work.

footer.blurb: Providing professional massage therapy services to help you relax, rejuvenate, and restore your body and mind.

serviceAreaBlurb: Trillium serves the greater LA Metro Area, bringing a full spa experience directly to your home — no traffic, no stress, no extra charges.

features.title: Personalized Care
features.description: Tailored to your specific needs and goals

features.title: Full Spa Setup
features.description: Heated table, aromatherapy, and hot stones included

features.title: Flexible Scheduling
features.description: Available 7 days a week across the LA Metro Area

tiers.title: 60-Minute Massage
features: Focus on 1–2 specific areas of tension (e.g., neck, shoulders, or back)
Good for stress relief and general relaxation
Enough time for a focused therapeutic session or a lighter full-body pass

tiers.title: 90-Minute Massage
features: Balanced full-body massage with extra focus on 2–3 problem areas
Ideal for combining relaxation and deeper therapeutic work
Time to address chronic tightness while still covering the whole body

tiers.title: 120-Minute Massage
features: Comprehensive full-body massage with detailed work on multiple areas
Best choice for chronic pain, athletes, or deeper restorative sessions
Allows slow, thorough treatment without rushing any part of the body

pricing.note: All-inclusive. No hidden fees. No additional travel charges.
pricing.pageLead: Transparent pricing for all massage sessions. No hidden fees, no travel charges.
notes: No hidden fees. No additional travel charges.
Payment accepted: cash, Venmo, CashApp, credit card.
A cancellation fee may apply with under 24-hour notice.
